title: kimi-review: compiler portability for #pragma GCC diagnostic
description: Fix all instances of unguarded #pragma GCC diagnostic by wrapping with __GNUC__ / __clang__ checks (matching existing patterns in tx_queue/main.c and senml.h etc). Must follow strict process: after EVERY code chunk/edit, run 3 independent /codereview passes, file ALL findings as codereview beads (P0-P4), do not close any until 3 clean passes with no new findings. Then bd ready --limit 5. This is for project-LICHEN-xxgh.
